case.title: U S v. TERMINAL RAILROAD ASS'N OF ST LOUIS

opinion.h1: U S v. TERMINAL RAILROAD ASS'N OF ST LOUIS, 215 U.S. 595 (1910)
opinion.h2: UNITED STATES v. TERMINAL RAILROAD ASSOCIATION OF ST. LOUIS et al. No. 597.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The Attorney General and the Solicitor General for the United States.
No appearance for the Terminal R. R. Association et al.
Certificate dismissed on the authority of Baltimore & O. R. Co. v. Interstate Commerce Commission, 215 U.S. 216, 54 L. Ed. --, 30 Sup. Ct. Rep. 86.
